channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: huangserva/3DCellForge
item.description: AI-powered interactive 3D cell generation and exploration studio.

item.title: cclank/cell-architecture-studio
item.description: Interactive 3D cell architecture gallery built with React and Three.js

item.title: LSPosed/DirtySepolicy
item.description: (no description)

item.title: ThatXliner/rust-but-lisp
item.description: Rust but LISP

item.title: thakur-works/Velocity-Executor
item.description: This repository contains Velocity Executor — a free Roblox script executor for PC built for fast injection, stable performance, and easy access. Includes Level 8 execution in 2026 with no ads, no key checkpoints, and no extra verification.

item.title: thakur-works/DarkGPT
item.description: Darkgpt mod free #chatgpt

item.title: williamcachamwri/zalo-tg
item.description: (no description)

item.title: iampedii/WhiteDNS
item.description: Source-available Android DNS tunneling client with VPN and proxy modes, backed by MasterDNS & StormDNS.

item.title: TwilitRealm/dusk
item.description: Dusk brings a classic adventure to PC and mobile platforms with a variety of fixes and improvements.

item.title: edrisranjbar/g2ray
item.description: (no description)

item.title: nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1
item.description: Hermes Desktop - OS1 Edition: native macOS workspace for Hermes Agent on Orgo cloud computers and SSH hosts

item.title: Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI
item.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

item.title: crynta/terax-ai
item.description: Lightweight (7MB) AI terminal emulator (ADE) built in Rust & Tauri & React

item.title: mykolaharmash/notelet
item.description: SwiftUI component for displaying rich release notes inside an app

item.title: PentHertz/LUKSbox
item.description: Store sensitive files in the cloud, or on shared media without trusting the host. LUKSbox is a Rust-based encrypted-container tool with passphrase, FIDO2 (YubiKey, Titan, Nitrokey, Windows Hello), TPM 2.0, and hybrid post-quantum (ML-KEM-768 / 1024) keyslots. Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

item.title: vercel-labs/zero-native
item.description: Build native desktop + mobile apps with web UI and Zig

item.title: openai/openai-cli
item.description: Official CLI for the OpenAI API

item.title: NVlabs/cuda-oxide
item.description: cuda-oxide is an experimental Rust-to-CUDA compiler that lets you write (SIMT) GPU kernels in safe(ish), idiomatic Rust. It compiles standard Rust code directly to PTX — no DSLs, no foreign language bindings, just Rust.

item.title: mvanhorn/cli-printing-press
item.description: Every API has a secret identity. This finds it, absorbs every feature from every competing tool, then builds the GOAT CLI — designed for AI agents first, with SQLite sync, offline search, and compound insight commands.

item.title: mvanhorn/printing-press-library
item.description: Official library of CLIs generated by the CLI Printing Press. Endorsed, tested, and community-contributed.

item.title: Angus184527/Atingle-Executor
item.description: Open-Source, roblox script injector & executor

item.title: V4bel/dirtyfrag
item.description: (no description)

item.title: antirez/ds4
item.description: DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal

item.title: earendil-works/pi
item.description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

item.title: anthropics/financial-services
item.description: (no description)

item.title: strukto-ai/mirage
item.description: A Unified Virtual Filesystem For AI Agents

item.title: lightseekorg/tokenspeed
item.description: TokenSpeed is a speed-of-light LLM inference engine.

item.title: modem-dev/hunk
item.description: Review-first terminal diff viewer for agentic coders

item.title: nexu-io/open-design
item.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

item.title: EvoLinkAI/awesome-gpt-image-2-API-and-Prompts
item.description: GPT-Image-2 API and Prompts

item.title: vasu-devs/JustHireMe
item.description: Local-first AI job intelligence workbench for scraping roles, ranking fit, and generating tailored application materials.

item.title: WeritoP/BetterNitroDiscord
item.description: BetterDiscord Plugin for Nitro features. Unlock screensharing modes, use cross-server and gif emotes and much more!

item.title: VRSEN/OpenSwarm
item.description: (no description)

item.title: browserbase/skills
item.description: Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool

item.title: XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-content
item.description: Content is already a cheat-code race—whoever cracks the patterns first wins the traffic. Your auto-evolving ops expert that learns YOUR account, not the global average. The Claude Code workflow behind 1M followers in 1 month.

item.title: angelos-p/llm-from-scratch
item.description: (no description)

item.title: vercel-labs/deepsec
item.description: Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents

item.title: LayrKits/Sprite-Pipeline
item.description: 2D Sprite Sheet Creation Pipeline
